actionUnits.condition: Initialize known state for room3 (GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). MonoBehaviour_0 (script_fileID: 829909757) maps to script 'room3' with fields wired per scene: doorAnim -> 1865011923 (Animator on child), winton -> 829909759 (AudioSource on Room 3). No m_Calls provided; object has no Rigidbody/Collider/EventTrigger, so we manually invoke public no-arg methods. Expected: laser1 becomes false; door remains closed; no animation or audio.

Single-laser active path. Using MonoBehaviour_0 (room3, GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). Expected: after one SetLaser() call, laser1 = true, laser2 = false; Update() should not open the door; Animator(1865011923) should not play; AudioSource(829909759) should not play.

Both lasers active path to trigger door open. MonoBehaviour_0 (room3, GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). Expected: after two SetLaser() calls within the same frame, laser1 && laser2 == true; in Update(), doorOpen toggles true, doorAnim.Play("DoorOpen",0,0) on Animator fileID 1865011923, and winton.Play() on AudioSource fileID 829909759.
Post-open regression: calling DesactivateLaser() after door opened should not close the door (no code path to close). Expected: doorOpen remains true; no reverse animation; no additional audio calls.

actionUnits.condition: Verification of scene bindings only. PrefabInstance 1131040470 ('Cube_salle3 (1)') has Rigidbody and BoxCollider (id: 1659405682678754060). It contains MonoBehaviour_0 id: 5374773463603666079 mapped to script 'SnapToTrigger' (GUID: 2723dba42bd113044ad231906b498006). This script relies on XRGrabInteractable/XRGeneralGrabTransformer and exposes public method Snap(Vector3), which requires a parameter and thus cannot be invoked via Trigger. Start() and Update() execute automatically when enabled; to cover Snap(Vector3) and the isSnapped branch we need the pedestal/trigger object or an event that calls Snap with a target Vector3.
